items.question: We already use a WhatsApp Business App; why do we need a unified platform like MSG91?
items.answer: The standard WhatsApp App is built for 1-to-1 chats, but it doesn't allow for Automation or Scalability. Once you start getting more than 10 leads a day, manual replies become impossible. MSG91’s Unified Platform allows multiple agents to handle one WhatsApp number, automates the qualification of leads, and ensures that if a customer doesn't respond on WhatsApp, a Failover SMS is sent automatically. It turns a "chat app" into a professional Revenue Engine.

items.question: How does the "Pay-As-You-Go" pricing model benefit my travel agency during the off-season?
items.answer: Unlike expensive software that charges you a heavy monthly subscription regardless of your sales, MSG91 works on a consumption basis. During the busy Peak Season, you pay for the high volume of successful bookings you handle. During the off-season, your costs drop naturally as your volume decreases. This ensures your Communication Infrastructure is always affordable and never a burden on your overheads.

items.question: Can I automate my entire booking journey, from inquiry to post-trip feedback?
items.answer: Yes! Using our No-Code Flow Builder, you can design a High-Conversion Travel Funnel. You can set it to: greet a new lead instantly on WhatsApp; send a professional Email itinerary after the call; trigger a Payment Link via SMS when they are ready to book; and send an automated Post-Trip "Welcome Home" message to collect Google Reviews. This ensures a Seamless Customer Journey without your team having to lift a finger for repetitive tasks.

items.question: How difficult is it to integrate MSG91 with our existing website or Travel CRM?
items.answer: Integration is straightforward and "Developer-Friendly." We provide robust APIs and Webhooks that connect with almost all major Travel CRMs and website builders. If you don't have a tech team, our Onboarding Experts provide step-by-step documentation and support to ensure your Lead Capture Automation is up and running within a few days.

items.question: Will using automated messages affect the personal touch my clients expect?
items.answer: Actually, it enhances it. By automating "routine" messages—like sending receipts, flight updates, or visa checklists—you ensure your clients are never ignored. This gives your travel agents more time to have high-quality, personalized consultations for complex itineraries. Automation handles the Infrastructure, while you provide the Empathy and Expertise.

items.question: What is the benefit of using RCS (Rich Business Messaging) over a normal SMS?
items.answer: RCS is the next generation of texting. It allows you to send high-resolution images of hotels, carousel sliders of different packages, and "Book Now" buttons directly inside the default messaging app of a phone. For an Indian travel agency, this is a massive Competitive Advantage, as it makes your brand look premium and makes it incredibly easy for the customer to take action.
